associations.title: Associations
associations.lead: The directory of associations that are members of the Assembly platform across various industries and fields.
associations.about: {name} is a member association of the Uzbekistan Economy Assembly. It unites organisations and professionals in its field and protects the interests of its members.

services.title: Services
services.lead: A full range of professional services for our members and partners.

items.name: Consulting & legal support
items.desc: Organisation registration, document handling and legal advice.

items.name: Education & training
items.desc: Professional development courses, seminars and certified programmes.

items.name: Grants & funding
items.desc: Finding grants, preparing applications and support with project funding.

items.name: Networking & events
items.desc: Organising conferences, forums and partnership meetings.

items.name: Media & PR
items.desc: Brand development, social media and work with mass media.

items.name: Digital transformation
items.desc: Websites, process automation and adoption of digital tools.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: The Assembly's 20 strategic projects across economy, education, innovation, media and social development.

items.name: EDU-JOB
items.desc: A platform connecting the education system and the labour market. Guides youth into careers and brings them to real jobs through skills and practice.

items.name: INVEST HUB
items.desc: Brings investors, projects, financial institutions and service providers into a single ecosystem. Turns ideas into capital and practical projects.

items.name: CENTRAL ASIAN SMART CITY
items.desc: A modern smart-city concept uniting international trade, industry, logistics, finance, R&D and living environment in Central Asia.

items.name: TERMIZ INDUSTRIAL HUB
items.desc: Strengthens access to South Asia, Afghanistan and regional markets through Termez. Develops export, manufacturing and cross-border trade.

items.name: KONGLOMERAT
items.desc: Builds large, competitive strategic companies of Uzbekistan able to enter international markets. Takes national business to the global level.

items.name: R&D HUB
items.desc: Supports scientific research, analysis, technology, innovation and new-product development. Acts as a practical bridge between science and business.

items.name: SOKIN OSMON
items.desc: A national initiative for the safe management of drones, low-altitude airspace and the sky economy. Unites security, technology and a new economic sector.

items.name: CHAQIRIQ
items.desc: Unites youth, professionals and proactive people around national goals. A platform that awakens talent, ideas and action.

items.name: REPORTAJ GO
items.desc: A modern media platform producing fast, open and high-quality video reports on society, the economy, reforms and real projects.

items.name: MOEX
items.desc: A hub developing international trade, export-import and B2B cooperation. Brings Uzbek products to foreign markets and systematises trade processes.

items.name: YOSHLAR KAPITALI 2030
items.desc: A national development programme providing financial and institutional support for youth entrepreneurship, startups, knowledge capital and innovative ideas.

items.name: WOMAN UP
items.desc: A platform to advance women's entrepreneurship, leadership, professional growth and social activity. Strengthens the economic potential of the modern Uzbek woman.

items.name: OQSOQOLLAR KENGASHI
items.desc: An advisory council grounded in experience, wisdom, values and public trust. Builds a reliable bridge between the state, society, youth and the older generation.

items.name: IQTISODIY DIPLOMATIYA DEPARTAMENTI
items.desc: Develops systematic ties with international organisations, embassies, investors and foreign partners. Advances Uzbekistan's interests in the global economic arena.

items.name: BIZNES TV
items.desc: A modern tele-media platform delivering business, economic, investment and market analysis to the public in a simple, high-quality and professional format.

items.name: IQTISODIY ILMIY KENGASH
items.desc: Produces scientific and analytical conclusions on economic policy, reforms, industrialisation, investment and strategic projects. Supports effective decisions through expertise and recommendations.

items.name: TAYANCH CHARITABLE TRUST
items.desc: Systematically supports vulnerable people, education, healthcare and charitable initiatives. Creates positive change in society through humanity and social responsibility.

items.name: YANGI BUYUK IPAK YO'LI
items.desc: Strengthens Uzbekistan's historic trade routes, transport-logistics potential, cultural exchange and regional economic integration. A strategic project connecting the region and the world.

items.name: YA GO
items.desc: An innovative platform uniting modern mobile services, digital services and convenient solutions for youth and the public. Makes daily life easy and efficient.

items.name: FIKRAT TV
items.desc: An intellectual-format media space covering important social issues, reforms, expert opinions and strategic ideas.

news.title: News
news.lead: The latest on the Assembly's work, its strategic projects, partnerships and media initiatives.

about.title: About us
about.lead: The Uzbekistan Economy Assembly is a national economic integrator: it brings the capabilities of government, business, science, international partners and media together around a single result.
about.intro: A public-economic platform officially registered on 10 February 2021. Inspired by Japan's Keidanren model, it exists to serve the economic development of New Uzbekistan in practical terms.
about.principle: THE FOUNDATION is people. THE GOAL is progress.
about.introNote: The Assembly operates as a GPPP ecosystem that directs entrepreneurs, associations, government bodies, investors and international partners towards a single result.
role: Identifying entrepreneurs' needs and connecting them to solutions
Linking government programmes with business initiatives
Integrating investment, export, industry and innovation
Building economic activity and trust across society
about.missionSectionLead: The mission is why we exist. The goal is the result we serve.
about.mission: To contribute to the economic renaissance of New Uzbekistan by developing the country's economy and supporting entrepreneurs, investment, export, industry, innovation and human capital.
about.goal: To be the practical integration platform that turns Uzbekistan into a major economic, industrial, trade, investment and innovation centre of Central Asia.
about.goalNote: The goal is not merely a concept — it becomes a working mechanism through 50 associations, 20 projects, the FR/BR/PR/GR system and AI MediaNet.
about.valuesLead: The five pillars that guide the Assembly's work
about.directionsLead: The key pillars of the Assembly's work
about.architectureLead: GPPP: economic integration built on Government – Public – Private Partnership
about.architectureNote: The Assembly directs every economic force towards one national result.
about.mechanismLead: A continuous cycle: need — solution — coverage — trust — new participants
about.formula: The 50 associations bring in the entrepreneur, the Assembly's projects serve them, FR opens international opportunity, BR connects business, GR aligns with government, and PR together with AI MediaNet shows the result to the public.
about.blocksTitle: FR / BR / PR / GR — four functional wings
about.blocksLead: Every project connects to international, business, public and government opportunity through these blocks

blocks.title: Foreign Relations
blocks.desc: Relations with international partners, investors, embassies, foreign companies and financial institutions.

blocks.title: Business Relations
blocks.desc: Working with entrepreneurs, companies, associations, investors and service organisations.

blocks.title: Public Relations
blocks.desc: Communication with the public and media: brand, social trust, and the Chaqiriq and Reportaj GO projects.

blocks.title: Government Relations
blocks.desc: Ministries, agencies, regional administrations, strategic programmes and coordination with the state.

about.mediaTitle: AI MediaNet — the coverage, analysis and impact layer
about.mediaLead: The Assembly's results become visible capital through social networks, media and artificial intelligence
about.mediaTagline: Content plan • monitoring • social trust • media impact • pages for leaders and associations
about.mediaSummary: AI MediaNet does more than cover the Assembly's work — it also tracks audience sentiment, content performance and the level of economic confidence.

media.title: Project coverage
media.desc: A steady content stream for every project

media.title: Analysis and monitoring
media.desc: Identifying which topics have real impact

about.partnersLead: Integration with government, international financial institutions, banks, consulting firms and technology companies
about.valueTitle: The result: value for government, business, investors and society
about.valueLead: Each stakeholder gains something distinct, but the shared outcome is sustainable economic growth

valueItems.title: For government
valueItems.desc: A systematic view of entrepreneurs' problems, strategic programmes tied to real business needs, and greater economic activity.

valueItems.title: For entrepreneurs
valueItems.desc: Access to investment, export, talent, media, consulting, work with the state and entry into international cooperation.

valueItems.title: For investors
valueItems.desc: Reliable companies, ready projects, a partnership channel and an entry point into the local ecosystem.

valueItems.title: For society
valueItems.desc: New jobs, economic optimism, active youth and women, an innovative environment and social trust.

about.roadmapLead: Measurable results that turn the Assembly's mechanism into a working management system

roadmap.title: CRM and service catalogue
roadmap.desc: A register of associations, entrepreneurs' needs and a service package for each project.

roadmap.title: Partnerships and portfolio
roadmap.desc: Practical projects with investors, banks, consulting firms and technology partners.

roadmap.title: Results and impact
roadmap.desc: Real solutions for entrepreneurs, media coverage, and the trust of government and international partners.

results.title: Sustainable economy
results.desc: A competitive, diversified and growing national economy.

results.title: Prosperous society
results.desc: A society built on citizens' wellbeing and equal opportunity.

results.title: New renaissance
results.desc: A New Uzbekistan where science, culture and entrepreneurship flourish.

about.motto: One goal — one path — one future!
about.slogan: Let us build a great future together!
